title: Grilled Black Bean and American Cheese Skewers
description: A simple and flavorful recipe featuring black bean and american cheese skewers, perfect for a quick snack or side dish.

ingredients.name: Black skewers
ingredients.notes: Soak in water for 30 minutes before grilling

instructions: Soak the black skewers in water for 30 minutes.
Thread an American cheese quarter, 2-3 black beans, and 1 tender onto each skewer.
Grill skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until the cheese is melted and the tenders are heated through.
